_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: Western blot analysis showed no significant changes in protein expression between pan-neuronal rescue of full-length, wild-type Nf1 and pan-neuronal expression of full-length Nf1 carrying the R1320P missense mutation
details: Successfully detected GFP-tagged Nf1 constructs in western blot, showing no significant difference in protein levels between wild-type and R1320P mutant (p = 0.510)
